acknowledgement_of_receipt.address: 742 Willow Creek Drive, Apartment 3B, Richmond, VA 23221

means_of_communication.other_contact: Preferred contact order: 1) cell phone for urgent clinical issues or same-day appointment changes between 8:00 AM and 7:00 PM; 2) email for non-urgent questions, lab results notifications, and appointment reminders (I check email multiple times a day); 3) work phone only for billing or scheduling matters if you cannot reach me on my cell. Please do not leave detailed medical information on voicemail; instead, leave a brief message with a call-back number and best time to reach me. Voicemail is enabled on both my home and cell numbers.
